name: orchard
description: The orchard marketplace. Companion plugins for the orchard worktree/session dashboard. Hosts conversation-contracts (auto-open + close on /exit) and claude-contracts (general append-only contract authoring via scripts/contracts/).

plugins.name: conversation-contracts
plugins.description: Auto-open a conversation contract on the first user message of every session. Surfaces a loose-ends inventory at Stop. Only the user can close the contract via /close-conversation, /exit, /quit, or /bye. MCP tools: open_contract, close_contract. Hooks: UserPromptSubmit, Stop.

plugins.name: claude-contracts
plugins.description: Track work commitments via /contracts:* skills and the contracts MCP server. Consumes scripts/contracts/. Three statuses (started | blocked | delivered) with append-only history.
